Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.

Provides three sibling pieces that together let a Juneau REST resource render JSP templates:

  • JspMixin — mixin that serves raw .jsp resources from the importer's classpath under /jsp/* and auto-registers JspViewRenderer.
  • JspView — immutable value class (implements the core View interface) returned from @RestOp methods to ask the framework to render a JSP.
  • JspViewRenderer — ResponseProcessor that detects JspView returns and dispatches via ServletContext.getRequestDispatcher(...).forward(...).
Composition example (microservice):

@Rest(path="/app", mixins=JspMixin.class) public class AppResource extends RestServlet { @Bean JspMixin jsp() { return JspMixin.create() .basePath("/WEB-INF/views/") .build(); } @RestGet("/hello/{name}") public View hello(@Path String name) { return JspView.of("hello.jsp").attr("name", name); } }

Engine-agnostic packaging:

The bridge module's main POM declares only the JSP API + JSTL impl in provided scope — no JSP engine ships here. Consumers add the engine matching their container:

  • Jetty 12 EE11 (microservice-jetty, Spring Boot embedded Jetty): org.eclipse.jetty.ee11:jetty-ee11-apache-jsp.
  • Embedded Tomcat (Spring Boot default): org.apache.tomcat.embed:tomcat-embed-jasper.
  • External-WAR deployments (Tomcat / JBoss / WildFly): engine is already on the container's classpath; no additional dependency required.

When no engine is on the classpath, the renderer surfaces a clear diagnostic naming the missing dependency and linking to the "Choosing a JSP engine" matrix in JspViewSupport.md.

See Also:
  • View
  • JSP View Support
  • REST Server — Mixins and Multi-Mount Paths

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
    Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
    Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
    Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.

    Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    JspDispatcher
    Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the JSP raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the JspMixin mixin, the JspServlet servlet, and the JspResource child flavors.
    JspDispatcher.Builder
    Builder for JspDispatcher.
    JspMixin
    Mixin that wires JSP view-rendering onto any Juneau REST resource.
    JspMixin.Builder
    Builder for JspMixin.
    JspResource
    Child-resource flavor of the JspMixin mixin.
    JspServlet
    Standalone servlet companion of the JspMixin mixin.
    JspView
    Immutable value class returned from @RestOp-annotated methods to ask the framework to render a JSP template.
    JspViewRenderer
    ResponseProcessor that detects JspView-typed return values and dispatches them to the underlying JSP engine via ServletContext.getRequestDispatcher(...).forward(...).
